name: PR Apply
description: Analyze external PRs and apply similar changes to the current project

name: Codebase Visualizer
description: Generate an interactive HTML tree view of your project structure

name: Commit Conventions
description: Create commits following conventional commit standards with smart scope detection

name: DB Migrate
description: Generate and apply database migrations for Prisma, Drizzle, or Knex

name: API Docs Generator
description: Generate OpenAPI specs and interactive docs from your codebase

name: Deploy Helper
description: Deploy to Vercel, Fly.io, Railway, or AWS with guided workflows

name: Test Generator
description: Generate unit and integration tests based on your codebase patterns

name: i18n Helper
description: Extract, manage, and auto-translate i18n strings across your project
